cities.name: Athens
cities.notes: Acropolis and Parthenon, Monastiraki flea market and vibrant Plaka

cities.name: Santorini
cities.notes: Iconic blue-domed churches, caldera sunset views and volcanic beaches

cities.name: Mykonos
cities.notes: Cosmopolitan party island with windmills, Little Venice and beaches

cities.name: Thessaloniki
cities.notes: Byzantine walls, Roman rotunda and the best bougatsa in Greece

cities.name: Rhodes
cities.notes: UNESCO medieval old town, Palace of the Grand Master and Lindos acropolis

cities.name: Crete
cities.notes: Minoan Palace of Knossos, Samaria Gorge hike and pristine Elafonissi beach
